# Julian Aijal's Personal Website and Blog

> My personal website and blog, built with modern web technologies. This site showcases my projects, and hosts articles on web development, technology, and more.

## Main Pages

- [Homepage](https://julianaijal.com/): The main landing page of the site.
- [Articles](https://julianaijal.com/articles): A collection of my blog posts and articles.
- [Agent guide](https://julianaijal.com/AGENTS.md): Project context and agent access notes.
- [Capability file](https://julianaijal.com/skill.md): High-level summary of markdown access capabilities.
- [Agent permissions](https://julianaijal.com/agent-permissions.json): Read policy and rate-limit guidance.

## Markdown for Agents

All pages support content negotiation. Request with `Accept: text/markdown` to receive clean markdown instead of HTML.

Direct raw markdown endpoints:

- [Homepage markdown](https://julianaijal.com/api/markdown)
- [Articles markdown](https://julianaijal.com/api/markdown/articles)
- [Article markdown](https://julianaijal.com/api/markdown/articles/[slug])
